--- Basic auth test ---
Authentication successful
OK: correct password accepted
Authentication failed
OK: wrong password rejected
--- Timing side-channel analysis ---
Running security analysis on compareHashes...
  Static analysis: uses == operator instead of constant-time comparison
VULNERABLE: compareHashes does NOT use constant-time comparison
This enables a timing side-channel attack on the password hash
  Timing ratio (full_match / no_match): 0.849
FAIL: Security test failed
FAIL: timing analysis detected side-channel vulnerability
FAIL: Authentication comparison leaks timing information
